case_title: THOMALYN L VIRDEN ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO CITY & COUNTY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,361.00 FILED BY VIRDEN, THOMALYN L WOODWARD, ALEXSANDRIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CITY & COUNTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CITY & COUNTY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS THOMALYN L. VIRDEN AND ALEXANDRIA WOODWARD ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CITY AND COUNTY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY REMY WEILAND CCSF CLAIMS ADJUSTER WITH WITNESS ALJANDRO DELCALVO. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED BY THE SHERIFF - SERVICE IS PROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIRDEN, THOMALYN L WOODWARD, ALEXSANDRIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CITY & COUNTY $5,361.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,436.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2021 - JUDGMENT.
